Contractor|BlackBoxRecoverDescription: I'm willing to shell out some good credits to have a cutter go take the black box from a wreck over to ~mission(Destination). I'm not gonna be able to sleep proper till I know that the damn thing's been wiped.

So here's the rub. There wasn't time to clean up proper after a job, and now I need someone to disappear a black box for me. All you got to do is mosey over to the wreck, pull the box, and leave it at ~mission(Destination).

Some idiot crew went and got themselves dead. No big deal. Happens every day, right? 

Trouble is, seems like there's some pluggers interested in figuring out the how, and the black box is still sitting out there waiting to spill everything.
 
Need someone to take the stupid thing from the wrecksite over to ~mission(Destination) so it can be properly destroyed, and the mystery of who did what can stay a mystery.

People are starting to snoop around and try to figure out what happened to this missing crew. That's a problem. Better for everyone if the past stays buried.
 
It'd make me real happy if someone were to go hunt down their flight recorder and take it to ~mission(Destination). The kind of happy that pays good credits.

We all do things we kinda regret, right? Well, someone might have gone a little overboard and now there's a black box full of incriminating data that needs to be boosted and taken to ~mission(Destination) before anyone else can find it.

a black box full of lies
better for everyone if it dies
it's at the wreck, waiting its turn 
take it to ~mission(Destination) and let it burn
credits earned, favors made
get it done, you'll be paid
Contractor:
We're running low on supply and need an extra pilot to help move things along.

You'll grab the raw ingredients from the farm, drop it off at the lab, take the refined stuff over to the stash to be cut and packaged, before taking the final product out to our runners. 

Here it is laid out plain so you don't get confused -

~mission(Itinerary)

And to make sure security doesn't start sniffing around, we arranged a dead-drop for the final hand off. 

Just keep it simple and follow the plan and it should be smooth sailing. Take care of everything on the list and you'll get a nice cut of the credits.
